revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 20 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 20 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月20日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * （[[121年]]_月_日） - 許慎による中国最古の字典『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（[[1187年]]_月_日） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[1331年]]_月_日） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平]]8年（[[1353年]]_月_日） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]10年（[[1605年]]_月_日） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（[[1654年]]_月_日） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（[[1806年]]_月_日） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月19日 (旧暦)|9月19日]] 翌日[[9月21日 (旧暦)|9月21日]] - 前月[[8月20日 (旧暦)|8月20日]] 翌月[[10月20日 (旧暦)|10月20日]] *新暦[[9月20日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: =忌日= 後光明天皇新暦換算

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月20日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - 北朝の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月19日 (旧暦)|9月19日]] 翌日[[9月21日 (旧暦)|9月21日]] - 前月[[8月20日 (旧暦)|8月20日]] 翌月[[10月20日 (旧暦)|10月20日]] *新暦[[9月20日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月20日'''（きゅうれきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[建光 (漢)|建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝 (漢)|安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1535年]][[10月16日]]） - [[丹羽長秀]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]） * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月1日]]） - [[本因坊秀栄]]、[[棋士 (囲碁)|囲碁棋士]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月20日'''（きゅうれきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[建光 (漢)|建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝 (漢)|安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1535年]][[10月16日]]） - [[丹羽長秀]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]） * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月1日]]） - [[本因坊秀栄]]、[[棋士 (囲碁)|囲碁棋士]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月20日'''（きゅうれきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[建光 (漢)|建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝 (漢)|安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1535年]][[10月16日]]） - [[丹羽長秀]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]） * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月1日]]） - [[本因坊秀栄]]、[[棋士 (囲碁)|囲碁棋士]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

== 忌日 == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September20日'''（きゅうれきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[建光 (漢)|建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝 (漢)|安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1535年]][[10月16日]]） - [[丹羽長秀]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]） * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月1日]]） - [[本因坊秀栄]]、[[棋士 (囲碁)|囲碁棋士]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）

'''September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September20-->きゅうれきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[建光 (漢)|建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝 (漢)|安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1535年]][[10月16日]]） - [[丹羽長秀]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]） * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月1日]]） - [[本因坊秀栄]]、[[棋士 (囲碁)|囲碁棋士]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）

'''September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September20-->きゅうれきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events == * [[建光 (漢)|建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝 (漢)|安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1535年]][[10月16日]]） - [[丹羽長秀]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]） * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月1日]]） - [[本因坊秀栄]]、[[棋士 (囲碁)|囲碁棋士]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== Deaths == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September20-->きゅうれきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events == * [[建光 (漢)|建光]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[121年]][[10月19日]]） - [[許慎]]による中国最古の[[字典]]『[[説文解字]]』が[[後漢]]の[[安帝 (漢)|安帝]]に献上される * [[文治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1187年]][[10月23日]]） - [[藤原俊成]]が『[[千載和歌集]]』を[[後白河天皇|後白河法皇]]に撰進 * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月22日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[光厳天皇]]が即位 * [[文和]]2年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1353年]][[10月17日]]） - [[足利尊氏]]が[[後光厳天皇]]を奉じて入京 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月4日]]） - [[明治天皇]]が[[京都]]を出発し[[東京]]へ向かう
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1535年]][[10月16日]]） - [[丹羽長秀]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]） * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月1日]]） - [[本因坊秀栄]]、[[棋士 (囲碁)|囲碁棋士]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== Deaths == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== Commemorations ==

== Deaths == * [[元亀]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1570年]][[10月19日]]） - [[森可成]]、[[武将]]（* [[1523年]]） * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[11月1日]]） - [[山内一豊]]、初代[[土佐藩]]主（* [[1546年]]） * [[承応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[10月30日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（* [[1633年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1730年]][[10月31日]]） - [[中甚兵衛]]、[[河内国]]今米村の[[庄屋]]・[[大和川]]の付け替え工事に尽力（* [[1639年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[10月31日]]） - [[喜多川歌麿]]、[[浮世絵]]師（* [[1753年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]] [[Category:Days 20 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]]

{{Lunar September}} '''September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September20れきくがつはつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:仏滅]] to [[Category:Butsumetsu]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
running another replacement to get rid of the category inappriproate overlap new ones added
adding korean to all the dates
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}}'', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}}, was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}}'' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}}. * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}}, a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|元亀}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}}). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}}, the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}}). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}}, the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}}) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}}, a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}}). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}}) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}}, an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}}'', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}}, was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}}'' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}}. * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}}). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}}, a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|元亀}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}}). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}}, the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}}). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}}, the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}}) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}}, a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}}). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}}) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}}, an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}}).

[[sn:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|元亀}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).

[[sn:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|元亀}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).

[[sn:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also! ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ). == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585年}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523年}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654年}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753年}} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year }} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year }} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year }} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year }} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year }} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year }} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year }} ).

[[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 20 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:New]] [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]][[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]]

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year }} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year }} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year }} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year }} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}
