revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year }} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year }} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year }} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year }} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year }} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō|12=draft}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=draft}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro|12=draft}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year|12=draft}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字|12=draft|12=draft}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen|12=draft|12=draft}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成|12=draft|12=draft}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集|12=draft|12=draft}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo|12=draft|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=draft|12=draft}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro|12=draft|12=draft}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字|12=draft|12=draft}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen|12=draft|12=draft}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成|12=draft|12=draft}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集|12=draft|12=draft}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo|12=draft|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=draft|12=draft}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro|12=draft|12=draft}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar September]] [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 20 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:September 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 20일]] [[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月廿]] [[en:draft:September 20 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字|12=draft|12=draft}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen|12=draft|12=draft}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成|12=draft|12=draft}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集|12=draft|12=draft}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo|12=draft|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=draft|12=draft}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro|12=draft|12=draft}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|121|ja|121st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''{{ill|Shuowen Jiezi|ja|説文解字|12=draft|12=draft}} '', compiled by {{ill|Xu Shen|ja|許慎|lt=Xu Shen|12=draft|12=draft}} , was presented to Emperor {{ill|An|ja|安帝|lt=Emperor An|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Later Han. * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1187|ja|1187th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara Toshinari|ja|藤原俊成|12=draft|12=draft}} presented the anthology ''{{ill|Senzaishū|ja|千載和歌集|12=draft|12=draft}} '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|ja|光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Kōgon|12=draft|12=draft}} of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of {{ill|Emperor Gōkō|ja|後光厳天皇|lt=Emperor Gōkō|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1535|ja|1535th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|ja|丹羽長秀|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (died {{ill|1585|ja|1585th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honinbo Shuei|ja|本因坊秀栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , a professional Go player (died {{ill|1907|ja|1907th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1570|ja|1570th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mori Kanenari|ja|森可成|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1523|ja|1523rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1605|ja|1605th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|ja|山内一豊|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo|12=draft|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born {{ill|1546|ja|1546年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōō|ja|承応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1654|ja|1654th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gōmyō|ja|後光明天皇|lt=Emperor Gōmyō|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 110th Emperor (born {{ill|1633|ja|1633rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1730|ja|1730th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=draft|12=draft}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文化|1=Bunka|2=ja|3=文化 (元号)|4=de|5=Bunka (Ära)|6=ko|7=분카|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1806|ja|1806年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kitagawa Utamaro|ja|喜多川歌麿|lt=Kitagawa Utamaro|12=draft|12=draft}} , an ukiyo-e artist (born {{ill|1753|ja|1753rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|19|9|21|8|20|10|9|0920}}

calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:AD 121|121]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''[[:en:Shuowen Jiezi|Shuowen Jiezi]] '', compiled by [[:en:Xu Shen|Xu Shen]] , was presented to Emperor [[:en:Emperor An|Emperor An]] of the Later Han. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1187|1187]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Shunzei|Fujiwara Toshinari]] presented the anthology ''[[:en:Senzai Wakashū|Senzaishū]] '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} . * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 2nd Year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1353|1353]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōkō]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 4th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1535|1535]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Niwa Nagahide|Niwa Nagahide]] , a military commander (died [[:en:1585|1585]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Shūei|Honinbo Shuei]] , a professional Go player (died [[:en:1907|1907]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – [[:en:Mori Yoshinari|Mori Kanenari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1523|1523]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Yamauchi Kazutoyo|Yamauchi Kazutoyo]] , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Emperor Gōmyō]] , the 110th Emperor (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Jinbe|1=Jinbē Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11366637}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * [[:en:Culture|Bunka]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Utamaro|Kitagawa Utamaro]] , an ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1753|1753]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenkou|1=Kenkou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486621}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:AD 121|121]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''[[:en:Shuowen Jiezi|Shuowen Jiezi]] '', compiled by [[:en:Xu Shen|Xu Shen]] , was presented to Emperor [[:en:Emperor An|Emperor An]] of the Later Han. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1187|1187]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Shunzei|Fujiwara Toshinari]] presented the anthology ''[[:en:Senzai Wakashū|Senzaishū]] '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} . * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 2nd Year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1353|1353]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōkō]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 4th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1535|1535]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Niwa Nagahide|Niwa Nagahide]] , a military commander (died [[:en:1585|1585]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Shūei|Honinbo Shuei]] , a professional Go player (died [[:en:1907|1907]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – [[:en:Mori Yoshinari|Mori Kanenari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1523|1523]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Yamauchi Kazutoyo|Yamauchi Kazutoyo]] , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Emperor Gōmyō]] , the 110th Emperor (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Jinbe|1=Jinbē Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11366637}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * [[:en:Culture|Bunka]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Utamaro|Kitagawa Utamaro]] , an ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1753|1753]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenkou|1=Kenkou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486621}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:AD 121|121]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''[[:en:Shuowen Jiezi|Shuowen Jiezi]] '', compiled by [[:en:Xu Shen|Xu Shen]] , was presented to Emperor [[:en:Emperor An|Emperor An]] of the Later Han. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1187|1187]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Shunzei|Fujiwara Toshinari]] presented the anthology ''[[:en:Senzai Wakashū|Senzaishū]] '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} . * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 2nd Year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1353|1353]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōkō]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 4th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1535|1535]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Niwa Nagahide|Niwa Nagahide]] , a military commander (died [[:en:1585|1585]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Shūei|Honinbo Shuei]] , a professional Go player (died [[:en:1907|1907]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – [[:en:Mori Yoshinari|Mori Kanenari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1523|1523]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Yamauchi Kazutoyo|Yamauchi Kazutoyo]] , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Emperor Gōmyō]] , the 110th Emperor (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Jinbe|1=Jinbē Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11366637}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * [[:en:Culture|Bunka]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Utamaro|Kitagawa Utamaro]] , an ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1753|1753]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月二十]][[zh:九月二十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840203]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 20|qq=September 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenkou|1=Kenkou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486621}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:AD 121|121]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''[[:en:Shuowen Jiezi|Shuowen Jiezi]] '', compiled by [[:en:Xu Shen|Xu Shen]] , was presented to Emperor [[:en:Emperor An|Emperor An]] of the Later Han. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1187|1187]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Shunzei|Fujiwara Toshinari]] presented the anthology ''[[:en:Senzai Wakashū|Senzaishū]] '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} . * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 2nd Year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1353|1353]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōkō]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 4th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1535|1535]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Niwa Nagahide|Niwa Nagahide]] , a military commander (died [[:en:1585|1585]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Shūei|Honinbo Shuei]] , a professional Go player (died [[:en:1907|1907]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – [[:en:Mori Yoshinari|Mori Kanenari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1523|1523]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Yamauchi Kazutoyo|Yamauchi Kazutoyo]] , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Emperor Gōmyō]] , the 110th Emperor (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Jinbe|1=Jinbē Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11366637}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * [[:en:Culture|Bunka]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Utamaro|Kitagawa Utamaro]] , an ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1753|1753]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 20일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月二十]][[zh:九月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 20일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月二十]][[zh:九月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月二十]][[zh:九月二十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840203]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 20|qq=September 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kenkou|ja|建光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenkou|1=Kenkou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486621}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:AD 121|121]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – The oldest Chinese dictionary, ''[[:en:Shuowen Jiezi|Shuowen Jiezi]] '', compiled by [[:en:Xu Shen|Xu Shen]] , was presented to Emperor [[:en:Emperor An|Emperor An]] of the Later Han. * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1187|1187]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Shunzei|Fujiwara Toshinari]] presented the anthology ''[[:en:Senzai Wakashū|Senzaishū]] '' to {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|後白河法皇|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317984}} . * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd Year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgon|Emperor Kōgon]] of the Northern Court ascended the throne. * [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 2nd Year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 8th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1353|1353]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} entered Kyoto, endorsing the authority of [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōgon|Emperor Gōkō]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] departed Kyoto and headed for Tokyo.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 4th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1535|1535]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Niwa Nagahide|Niwa Nagahide]] , a military commander (died [[:en:1585|1585]] ). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Shūei|Honinbo Shuei]] , a professional Go player (died [[:en:1907|1907]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 1st Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ) – [[:en:Mori Yoshinari|Mori Kanenari]] , a military commander (born [[:en:1523|1523]] ). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Yamauchi Kazutoyo|Yamauchi Kazutoyo]] , the first lord of the Tosa Domain (born [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Jōō (Edo period)|Shōō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Emperor Gōmyō]] , the 110th Emperor (born [[:en:1633|1633]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 15th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1730|1730]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – {{ill|Naka Jinbe|ja|中甚兵衛|lt=Naka Jinbe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Jinbe|1=Jinbē Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11366637}} , a village head from Imaze Village in Kawachi Province who significantly contributed to the reorganization of work on the Yamato River (born [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * [[:en:Culture|Bunka]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ) – [[:en:Utamaro|Kitagawa Utamaro]] , an ukiyo-e artist (born [[:en:1753|1753]] ).
